scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server -- --env-file=../.env" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && rm -rf server/public && cp -r client/dist server/public
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.cap:build: npm run build --prefix client && npx cap sync ios
